headline: United States Specialty Chemicals Industry Research Report 2025-2033 Featuring Solvay, Evonik, Clariant, Akzo Nobel, Dupont De Nemours, BASF, Kemira, LANXESS, Croda, Lubrizol
summary: The United States Specialty Chemicals Market is on track to reach $299.46 billion by 2033, up from $204.08 billion in 2025, at a CAGR of 4.91%. Key growth drivers include innovation, industrial expansion, and a rising demand for specialty chemicals across sectors like automotive, construction, and personal care. headline: LyondellBasell: Expected Dividend Cut Sets Up The Long-Term Bull Case
summary: LyondellBasell slashes its dividend 50% as earnings fall, but cost cuts and divestments progress. Check out why LYB stock is a hold.
